observations: Watch what moves in the first three months after the transition — that is where your answer will speak
remedies: When the currency trembles, keep your spending close and your records closer, and light a small lamp at dusk for three nights, asking only for steadiness

The shadow is that the shift may come with delay, bureaucracy, or a hard edge in public matters, since so much of your chart gathers in the hidden 12th and Saturn is burned close to the Sun there, but
